entities.name: PANGENOME

entities.name: AFLAPAN
entities.description: A previously published linear pangenome for 346 A. flavus isolates

entities.name: GRAPH BASED PANGENOME
entities.description: A pangenome construction method used to capture large structural variations and provide accurate genomic understanding

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Single base pair variations identified within the pangenome graph

entities.name: NON-SNPS
entities.description: Structural genomic variations other than single nucleotide polymorphisms

entities.description: Chromosome containing the aflatoxin biosynthesis pathway gene cluster

entities.description: A cluster of genes responsible for the production of aflatoxins

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC TREE
entities.description: A tool used to reveal evolutionary relationships and clustering among isolates based on genotypes
